headline: $1B Crypto Tycoon Joins SpaceX Mars Mission

article.title: Crypto entrepreneur Chun Wang joins SpaceX mission to Mars
article.summary: Chun Wang, who bankrolled and led a SpaceX flight over Earth’s poles, says he will head to Mars on SpaceX’s first manned mission to the red planet.

headline: Bitcoin ETFs Sink 6 Days, $140M Outflow Risk

article.title: Bitcoin ETFs' 6 day loss streak pushes market closer to net outflows for 2026
article.summary: Dek: US Bitcoin ETF net inflows have shrunk to $536 million so far in 2026, after recording a six-day run of net outflows totalling $1.55 billion.

headline: Stocks Surge 2% as Oil Plunges 4% Today

article.title: Stocks Extend Gains as Crude Oil Drops on Iran: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Global stocks rose to record highs as crude oil fell after officials signaled the US was nearing a deal with Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore oil flows. The dollar weakened.

headline: India Hikes Fuel Prices 4th Time in May

article.title: India Raises Diesel, Gasoline Prices for Fourth Time in May
article.summary: India’s state-run fuel retailers raised gasoline and diesel prices for the fourth time in 10 days in response to disruptions in global energy markets, a move that risks exacerbating inflationary risks in the economy.
